steps.title: Connect the name to ownership
steps.content: The goal is to explain how the Jules Falk Stradivarius got its name. The relevant notes say many surviving Stradivarius violins are named for previous owners and that this one is named for Jules Falk.

steps.title: Remove irrelevant details
steps.content: Choice A states who Jules Falk was but does not explain the violin's name. Choice B gives production and survival counts. Choice C focuses on quality and uses garbled phrasing rather than explaining the naming convention. The answer is D.
